creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Sorry, try this patch instead:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile bacula-docs/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/Makefile	Sat Sep 15 05:46:56 2007
+++ bacula-docs/Makefile	Fri Oct 12 08:30:38 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	bacula
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.4
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.5
  CATEGORIES=	sysutils
  MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	bacula
diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/distinfo bacula-docs/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-docs/distinfo	Sat Sep 15 05:46:56 2007
+++ bacula-docs/distinfo	Tue Oct 16 14:19:03 2007
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
-MD5 (bacula-docs-2.2.4.tar.bz2) = 115f7276ad5dda8060ac0f9595372cef
-SHA256 (bacula-docs-2.2.4.tar.bz2) = 2f08165d79d8d4d272ebb0076c62b11838333df688e0bf501c4d9a6dde41f2b5
-SIZE (bacula-docs-2.2.4.tar.bz2) = 22834195
-MD5 (bacula-2.2.4.tar.gz) = 2e3bbac3bf8b6d4c0825997c3009f18f
-SHA256 (bacula-2.2.4.tar.gz) = 10589ed1fcba823a02137f0eae841e64763e9b7a599087184c69d173350958b1
-SIZE (bacula-2.2.4.tar.gz) = 3020298
+MD5 (bacula-docs-2.2.5.tar.bz2) = 578e4221afd009d711f1430e392823d6
+SHA256 (bacula-docs-2.2.5.tar.bz2) = 7415d36ab4aa1324cc4cf1b7c587d5fcc9cc1a346f5ad3f73a1edf2f3a502882
+SIZE (bacula-docs-2.2.5.tar.bz2) = 22859223
+MD5 (bacula-2.2.5.tar.gz) = 175a796b96c28fc28cbedb1dc881826f
+SHA256 (bacula-2.2.5.tar.gz) = 97807281bd0143c2584a11e4af6572b276933efe2829b863cd49fff26ce24160
+SIZE (bacula-2.2.5.tar.gz) = 3015702
